services/cars-service/src/main/java/za/c.general_idea: Add @Service annotation to the interface to mark it as a Spring-managed component.
Import the Spring Service stereotype annotation.
Add missing space after comma in method signature for code style consistency.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.
Annotate the service implementation with @Service to register it as a Spring-managed bean.
Replace constructor-injected list with a static list from a Constant utility class.
Remove the constructor that previously accepted the list of cars, as the data source is now static.
Use Objects.equals for comparing Integer year to handle potential null values safely.
Reformat the long method signature and filter chain for better readability.

services/users-service/src/main/java/za/.general_idea: Annotate the implementation class with @Service to register it as a Spring-managed bean.

services/cars-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven parent from a custom project structure to spring-boot-starter-parent to inherit Spring Boot dependency management and build defaults.
Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to match the target runtime environment.
Added spring-boot-starter-web dependency to enable RESTful web service capabilities required for the microservice conversion.
Added spring-boot-starter-test dependency to provide testing utilities for the Spring Boot application.
Added explicit spring-web dependency, likely to ensure specific web components are available or to resolve transitive dependency issues.
Added spring-boot-maven-plugin to the build section to enable repackaging the application into an executable JAR.
